ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "overall_rating" REAL /* Overall rating of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position (e.g., mid, defender, attacker) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_positions" (
  "player_position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player position */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who plays the position */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position played by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_positions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_positions_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_skills" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who possesses the skill */,
  "dribbling" REAL /* Dribbling skill rating */,
  "ball_control" REAL /* Ball control skill rating */,
  "offside_trap" REAL /* Offside trap skill rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_skills_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., scout, coach, analyst) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_searches" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the search */,
  "search_query" TEXT /* Search query used */,
  "search_date" TEXT /* Date the search was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_searches_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the recommendation */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player recommended */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_recommendations_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_formations" (
  "formation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each formation */,
  "formation_name" TEXT /* Name of the formation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the formation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("formation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_formation_players" (
  "team_formation_player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team formation player */,
  "formation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the formation the player is in */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player in the formation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_formation_player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_formation_players_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_formation_players_formation_id FOREIGN KEY ("formation_id") REFERENCES team_formations ("formation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_transfer_history" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transfer */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player transferred */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player was transferred to */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date the transfer was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_transfer_history_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_transfer_history_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team plays in */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the team is from */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who got injured */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., muscle strain, broken bone) */,
  "injury_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., minor, major) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_performances" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who performed */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the performance was in */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performances_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performances_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who has the statistic */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target */,
  "passes_completed" INTEGER /* Number of passes completed */,
  "tackles_won" INTEGER /* Number of tackles won */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
